nodes.label: Explorar screen — section headings layout with content cards
nodes.description: Home tab showing content cards in a 2-column grid. Categories visible: AUDIOLIBROS and MEDITACIONES. Cards shown: Deep Work (Cal Newport, 5h 18m), El poder del ahora (Eckhart Tolle, 5h 40m), Cómo construir un MVP (28 min, Audiolibro), Respira y vuelve a ti (12 min, Meditación), Meditación para dormir (20 min), Meditación de gratitud (8 min). Section SERIES visible at bottom. Each card shows: cover image, category badge (AUDIOLIBROS/MEDITACIONES), title, author or brand (Mentex), duration. The Mentex Tweaks panel is open showing: AUTH (DEV) options (Welcome skip splash, Login screen), ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo — Activo selected), ACENTO (Color principal with teal toggle), ESTILO DE CARDS (Tarjetas/Glass/Líneas/Plano — Glass selected), TIPOGRAFÍA familia (Geist/Inter/Manrope — Inter selected).

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks developer panel — card style + typography controls
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel (Mentex Tweaks) floating over the Explorar screen. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with navigation shortcuts (Welcome skip splash, Login screen); ESTADO with Inactivo/Activo binary toggle (Activo highlighted); ACENTO showing Color principal with an active teal/green toggle; ESTILO DE CARDS with 4 options (Tarjetas, Glass, Líneas, Plano) — Glass is selected; TIPOGRAFÍA > Familia with options (Geist, Inter, Manrope) — Inter selected. Panel has an X close button in the top-right corner.
